scenario: Single filer with W-2 wages ($32,000) enrolled in ACA marketplace plan; SLCSP $5,800, annual premium $5,400, APTC advanced $3,600; TY2025 uses 2024 HHS FPL ($15,060 for size 1) per IRC §36B — income is 212.5% FPL; applicable contribution ~6.69%; PTC allowed $3,258; excess APTC repayment $342 added to tax via Schedule 2 line 2
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case based on Health Care Coverage module (Form 8962 — excess advance Premium Tax Credit repayment); IRC §36B; Rev. Proc. 2025-15 (PTC applicable percentages TY2025); 2024 HHS poverty guidelines ($15,060 base) apply for TY2025 per IRC §36B(d)(3)(C)
